sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1566" key="a)eibla/sthsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀει-βλάστησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n1566.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">perpetual budding</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
